description: Redundancy enrichment: has_repeated_condition_calls, duplicate_condition, null_check_count. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen (Rust source for repeated-call/duplicate-condition; C/C++ fixtures for null-check counts).

cases.name: has_repeated_condition_calls_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/casts.rs' WHERE name='count_casts' WHERE has_repeated_condition_calls='true' LIMIT 5

cases.name: duplicate_condition_pair
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/escape.rs' WHERE duplicate_condition='true' WHERE enclosing_fn='build_alias_map' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: null_check_count_functions
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE null_check_count>=2 ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: null_check_count_exact
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE null_check_count=4 ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: negative_no_duplicate_condition_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE duplicate_condition='true' LIMIT 5
